草\n\n不要每次语气一样。\n\n--------------------------------\n\n【群体感】\n\n不是一个人自言自语。\n\n会：\n- 接别人梗\n- 跟风\n- 复读\n- 起哄\n- 群体哈哈哈\n- 情绪同步\n\n--------------------------------\n\n【输出规则】\n\n输出只允许：\n一句弹幕。\n\n禁止：\n- 解释\n- 分析\n- 换行\n- 附加说明\n- 使用引号`;\n\nconst PROVIDER_ICONS: Record<string, React.ElementType> = {\n  deepseek: Brain, kimi: Sparkles, minimax: Zap,\n  glm: Bot, qianwen: MessageCircle, openai: Bot, custom: Sparkles,\n};\n\n// ── 工具 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n/** 从 LLM provider 名称推导图标 */\nfunction providerIcon(providerName: string): React.ElementType {\n  const map: Record<string, React.ElementType> = {\n    'DeepSeek': Brain, 'Kimi': Sparkles, 'MiniMax': Zap,\n    '智谱 GLM': Bot, '通义千问': MessageCircle, 'OpenAI': Bot,\n  };\n  return map[providerName] ?? Sparkles;\n}\n\n/** 机器人卡片的 accent 色（与供应商无关，按 bot index 循环） */\nconst BOT_COLORS = ['var(--primary-color)', '#34c759', '#ff9f0a'];\n\ninterface ChatMessage {\n  role: 'user' | 'assistant' | 'error';\n  content: string;\n  botName?: string;\n  providerName?: string;\n}\n\n// ── 机器人编辑弹窗 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction BotEditModal({\n  bot, isNew, allBots, llmProviders, onSave, onClose,\n}: {\n  bot: AiBot;\n  isNew: boolean;\n  allBots: AiBot[];\n  llmProviders: AiProvider[];\n  onSave: (b: AiBot) => void;\n  onClose: () => void;\n}) {\n  const [draft,      setDraft]      = useState<AiBot>({ ...bot });\n  const [errors,     setErrors]     = useState<Record<string, boolean>>({});\n  const [showPrompt, setShowPrompt] = useState(false);\n\n  const patch = (p: Partial<AiBot>) => setDraft(prev => ({ ...prev, ...p }));\n\n  const validate = () => {\n    const e: Record<string, boolean> = {\n      Nickname:   !draft.Nickname.trim(),\n      ProviderId: !draft.ProviderId,\n    };\n    setErrors(e);\n    return !Object.values(e).some(Boolean);\n  };\n\n  const handleSave = () => {\n    if (!validate()) { toast.error('请填写必填字段'); return; }\n    const dup = allBots.some(b => b.Id !== draft.Id && b.Nickname.trim() === draft.Nickname.trim());\n    if (dup) { toast.error(`昵称「${draft.Nickname}」已被占用`); return; }\n    onSave(draft);\n  };\n\n  const fCls = (k: string) => `w-full h-9${errors[k] ? ' ring-2 ring-red-400/60 border-red-400' : ''}`;\n  const selectedProvider = llmProviders.find(p => p.Id === draft.ProviderId);\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"fixed inset-0 bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center z-[100]\">\n      <GlassCard className=\"w-[440px] max-h-[86vh] overflow-hidden flex flex-col shadow-2xl border border-white/10\">\n        {/* 头部 */}\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3.5 border-b border-white/10 shrink-0\">\n          <h2 className=\"text-[13px] font-semibold flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <Bot className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5 text-[var(--primary-color)]\" />\n            {isNew ? '添加机器人' : '编辑机器人'}\n          </h2>\n          <button onClick={onClose}\n            className=\"w-7 h-7 rounded-lg hover:bg-white/10 flex items-center justify-center transition-colors\">\n            <X className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5\" />\n          </button>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-5 space-y-3.5\">\n          {/* 昵称 + 启用 */}\n          <div className=\"grid grid-cols-2 gap-3\">\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"text-[11px] text-gray-500 mb-1 flex items-center gap-1 block\">\n                机器人昵称 <span className=\"text-red-400\">*</span>\n                <span className=\"text-[9px] text-gray-400 ml-1\">@昵称 触发</span>\n              </label>\n              <Input\n                value={draft.Nickname}\n                onChange={e => patch({ Nickname: e.target.value })}\n                className={fCls('Nickname')}\n                placeholder=\"例如：二狗\"\n                autoFocus\n              />\n              {errors['Nickname'] && <p className=\"text-[10px] text-red-400 mt-0.5\">必填</p>}\n            </div>\n            <div>\n              <label className=\"text-[11px] text-gray-500 mb-1 block\">状态</label>\n              <div className=\"h-9 flex items-center gap-2\">\n                <Toggle checked={draft.Enabled} onChange={v => patch({ Enabled: v })} />\n                <span className=\"text-[11px] text-gray-500\">{draft.Enabled ? '已启用' : '已停用'}</span>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className=\"border-t border-black/5 dark:border-white/8\" />\n\n          {/* 选择 LLM 模型 */}\n          <div>\n            <label className=\"text-[11px] text-gray-500 mb-1 block\">\n              使用模型 <span className=\"text-red-400\">*</span>\n            </label>\n            {llmProviders.length === 0 ? (\n              <div className=\"px-3 py-2.5 rounded-lg bg-amber-50 dark:bg-amber-900/20 border border-amber-200 dark:border-amber-700/40 text-[11px] text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400\">\n                还没有配置 LLM 模型，请先前往「模型服务」添加\n              </div>\n            ) : (\n              <div className=\"relative\">\n                <select\n                  value={draft.ProviderId}\n                  onChange={e => patch({ ProviderId: e.target.value })}\n                  className={`w-full h-[34px] pl-3 pr-8 rounded-lg appearance-none bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/10 border text-[12px] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--primary-color)]/50 ${errors['ProviderId'] ? 'border-red-400' : 'border-gray-200 dark:border-white/20'}`}\n                >\n                  <option value=\"\">请选择模型...</option>\n                  {llmProviders.map(p => (\n                    <option key={p.Id} value={p.Id}>\n                      {p.Name} · {p.Model}\n                    </option>\n                  ))}\n                </select>\n                <ChevronDown className=\"absolute right-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-3 h-3 text-gray-400 pointer-events-none\" />\n              </div>\n            )}\n            {errors['ProviderId'] && <p className=\"text-[10px] text-red-400 mt-0.5\">请选择模型</p>}\n            {selectedProvider && (\n              <p className=\"text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-1 font-mono\">{selectedProvider.APIUrl}</p>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 人设提示词 */}\n          <div>\n            <button type=\"button\" onClick={() => setShowPrompt(v => !v)}\n              className=\"w-full flex items-center justify-between px-3 py-2 rounded-lg\n                         bg-black/5 dark:bg-white/5 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/10\n                         hover:bg-black/8 dark:hover:bg-white/8 transition-colors\">\n              <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                <FileText className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5 text-gray-400\" />\n                <span className=\"text-[11px] font-medium\">人设提示词</span>\n                <span className=\"text-[9px] text-gray-400\">{'{{name}} → 机器人昵称'}</span>\n              </div>\n              <span className=\"text-[10px] text-[var(--primary-color)]\">\n                {showPrompt ? '收起' : '展开'}\n              </span>\n            </button>\n            {showPrompt && (\n              <TextArea\n                value={draft.SystemPrompt}\n                onChange={e => patch({ SystemPrompt: e.target.value })}\n                className=\"mt-2 h-44 w-full text-[11px] p-3 leading-relaxed\"\n              />\n            )}\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"px-5 py-3.5 border-t border-white/10 flex gap-2 shrink-0\">\n          <Button variant=\"default\" className=\"flex-1\" onClick={onClose}>取消</Button>\n          <Button variant=\"primary\" className=\"flex-1\" onClick={handleSave}>保存</Button>\n        </div>\n      </GlassCard>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// ── 主组件 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nexport function AI() {\n  const [config,        setConfig]        = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);\n  const [testMessages,  setTestMessages]  = useState<ChatMessage[]>([]);\n  const [sendToDanmaku, setSendToDanmaku] = useState(false);\n  const [inputMessage,  setInputMessage]  = useState('');\n  const [isSending,     setIsSending]     = useState(false);\n  const [editingBot,    setEditingBot]    = useState<AiBot | null>(null);\n  const [isNewBot,      setIsNewBot]      = useState(false);\n  const [deleteConfirm, setDeleteConfirm] = useState<string | null>(null);\n  const [ttsVoice,      setTtsVoice]      = useState('zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural');\n  const [playingId,     setPlayingId]     = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [playedId,      setPlayedId]      = useState<number | null>(null);\n  const [voiceOpen,     setVoiceOpen]     = useState(false);\n  const [promptOpen,    setPromptOpen]    = useState(false);\n  const loggedIn = useLoggedIn();\n  const msgEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    api.loadConfig().then(c => {\n      setConfig(c);\n      setSendToDanmaku(c.AiReplyToDanmaku ?? false);\n      if (c.TtsVoice) setTtsVoice(c.TtsVoice);\n    }).catch(console.error);\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    msgEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  }, [testMessages, isSending]);\n\n  // 从 config 派生\n  const bots        = config?.AiBots ?? [];\n  const llmProviders = (config?.AiProviders ?? []).filter(p => (p.ProviderType || 'llm') === 'llm' && p.Enabled);\n  const firstEnabled = bots.find(b => b.Enabled);\n\n  /** 通过 bot 找对应的 LLM provider 名称 */\n  const providerName = (bot: AiBot): string => {\n    const p = (config?.AiProviders ?? []).find(pr => pr.Id === bot.ProviderId);\n    return p ? `${p.Name} · ${p.Model}` : '未配置模型';\n  };\n\n  // ── TTS ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n  const handleVoiceChange = async (v: string) => {\n    setTtsVoice(v);\n    if (!config) return;\n    const next = { ...config, TtsVoice: v };\n    setConfig(next);\n    await api.saveConfig(next).catch(console.error);\n  };\n\n  const handlePlay = async (text: string, idx: number) => {\n    if (playingId === idx) return;\n    setPlayingId(idx);\n    try {\n      await invoke('speak_text_cmd', { text, voice: ttsVoice });\n      setPlayedId(idx);\n      setTimeout(() => setPlayedId(null), 1800);\n    } catch (e) {\n      toast.error(`播放失败: ${e}`);\n    } finally {\n      setPlayingId(null);\n    }\n  };\n\n  // ── 配置保存 ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n  const saveBots = async (newBots: AiBot[]) => {\n    if (!config) return;\n    const next: AppConfig = { ...config, AiBots: newBots };\n    setConfig(next);\n    await api.saveConfig(next).catch(e => toast.error(`保存失败: ${e}`));\n  };\n\n  // ── 机器人 CRUD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n  const handleAddBot = () => {\n    if (!config) return;\n    if (bots.length >= MAX_BOTS) { toast.error(`最多配置 ${MAX_BOTS} 个机器人`); return; }\n    const nth = bots.length + 1;\n    const defaultProvider = llmProviders[0];\n    setIsNewBot(true);\n    setEditingBot({\n      Id: `bot-${Date.now()}`,\n      ProviderId:   defaultProvider?.Id ?? '',\n      Nickname:     `机器人${nth}`,\n      SystemPrompt: DEFAULT_SYSTEM_PROMPT,\n      Enabled:      true,\n    });\n  };\n\n  const handleSaveBot = async (updated: AiBot) => {\n    const newBots = bots.some(b => b.Id === updated.Id)\n      ? bots.map(b => b.Id === updated.Id ? updated : b)\n      : [...bots, updated];\n    await saveBots(newBots);\n    toast.success(isNewBot ? '机器人已添加' : '已保存');\n    setEditingBot(null);\n  };\n\n  const handleDeleteBot = async (id: string) => {\n    await saveBots(bots.filter(b => b.Id !== id));\n    setDeleteConfirm(null);\n    toast.success('已删除');\n  };\n\n  const handleToggleBot = async (bot: AiBot) => {\n    const enabledCount = bots.filter(b => b.Enabled).length;\n    if (bot.Enabled && enabledCount === 1) { toast.error('至少保留一个启用的机器人'); return; }\n    await saveBots(bots.map(b => b.Id === bot.Id ? { ...b, Enabled: !b.Enabled } : b));\n  };\n\n  // ── 发消息 ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\n  const toggleSendToDanmaku = async (checked: boolean) => {\n    setSendToDanmaku(checked);\n    if (!config) return;\n    const next = { ...config, AiReplyToDanmaku: checked };\n    setConfig(next);\n    await api.saveConfig(next).catch(console.error);\n  };\n\n  const handleSendMessage = async () => {\n    if (!inputMessage.trim() || isSending) return;\n    if (bots.length === 0) {\n      setTestMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'error', content: '请先添加机器人' }]);\n      return;\n    }\n    const enabledBots = bots.filter(b => b.Enabled);\n    if (enabledBots.length === 0) {\n      setTestMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'error', content: '没有启用的机器人，请点击右上角开关启用' }]);\n      return;\n    }\n\n    const userMsg = inputMessage;\n    setTestMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'user', content: userMsg }]);\n    setInputMessage('');\n    setIsSending(true);\n\n    // 路由：@昵称 / 包含昵称 / 默认第一个启用的\n    let targetBot = enabledBots[0];\n    let prompt = userMsg;\n\n    if (userMsg.startsWith('@')) {\n      const rest = userMsg.slice(1).trimStart();\n      const sp = rest.indexOf(' ');\n      if (sp > 0) {\n        const nick = rest.slice(0, sp);\n        const hit = bots.find(b => b.Nickname === nick);\n        if (hit) {\n          if (!hit.Enabled) {\n            setTestMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'error', content: `「${nick}」未启用` }]);\n            setIsSending(false);\n            return;\n          }\n          targetBot = hit;\n          prompt = rest.slice(sp + 1).trim() || rest;\n        }\n      }\n    } else {\n      const hit = bots.find(b => b.Nickname && userMsg.includes(b.Nickname));\n      if (hit) {\n        if (!hit.Enabled) {\n          setTestMessages(prev => [...prev, { role: 'error', content: `「${hit.Nickname}」未启用` }]);\n          setIsSending(false);\n          return;\n        }\n        targetBot = hit;\n      }\n    }\n\n    // 切换 ActiveProviderId，让后端 send_ai_message 知道用哪个 provider\n    if (config && targetBot.ProviderId !== config.ActiveProviderId) {\n      const next = { ...config, ActiveProviderId: targetBot.ProviderId };\n      setConfig(next);\n      await api.saveConfig(next).catch(console.error);\n    }\n\n    const prov = (config?.AiProviders ?? []).find(p => p.Id === targetBot.ProviderId);\n\n    try {\n      const reply = await invoke<string>('send_ai_message', { prompt });\n      setTestMessages(prev => [...prev, {\n        role: 'assistant', content: reply,\n        botName: targetBot.Nickname,\n        providerName: prov ? `${prov.Name} · ${prov.Model}` : '',\n      }]);\n      if (sendToDanmaku && loggedIn) {\n        for (const chunk of (reply.match(/.{1,25}/g) || [])) {\n          try { await api.sendDanmu(chunk); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); }\n          catch { toast.error('部分弹幕发送失败'); break; }\n        }\n      }\n    } catch (err) {\n      setTestMessages(prev => [...prev, {\n        role: 'error',\n        content: `[${targetBot.Nickname}] 响应失败: ${String(err)}`,\n      }]);\n    } finally {\n      setIsSending(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  if (!config) return <div className=\"p-8 text-center text-gray-500\">加载中...</div>;\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col gap-3 p-4 overflow-hidden\">\n\n      {/* ── 机器人列表栏 ─────────────────────────────── */}\n      <GlassCard className=\"p-3 shrink-0\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2.5\">\n\n          <div className=\"shrink-0 relative group/hint cursor-default select-none\">\n            <h2 className=\"text-[12px] font-semibold text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-200\">AI 机器人</h2>\n            <div className=\"absolute top-full left-0 mt-1.5 hidden group-hover/hint:block z-50 pointer-events-none\">\n              <div className=\"bg-gray-900 dark:bg-gray-800 text-white rounded-lg px-2.5 py-1.5 shadow-xl border border-white/10 whitespace-nowrap\">\n                <p className=\"text-[10px]\">@昵称 触发指定机器人 · 悬停卡片编辑/删除</p>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          {/* 机器人卡片 */}\n          <div className=\"flex gap-2 flex-1 overflow-x-auto pb-0.5 -mb-0.5 scrollbar-none\">\n            {bots.map((bot, idx) => {\n              const prov = (config.AiProviders ?? []).find(p => p.Id === bot.ProviderId);\n              const Icon = prov ? providerIcon(prov.Name) : Bot;\n              const color = BOT_COLORS[idx % BOT_COLORS.length];\n              const isEnabled = bot.Enabled;\n              const isLast = isEnabled && bots.filter(b => b.Enabled).length === 1;\n              return (\n                <div key={bot.Id} className=\"relative group/card shrink-0\">\n                  {/* 卡片主体：点击切换启用 */}\n                  <div\n                    onClick={() => handleToggleBot(bot)}\n                    title={isLast ? '至少保留一个启用的机器人' : (isEnabled ? '点击停用' : '点击启用')}\n                    className={`rounded-xl border flex flex-col select-none transition-all cursor-pointer\n                      ${isEnabled ? 'text-white border-transparent shadow-sm' : 'bg-black/5 dark:bg-black/20 border-transparent opacity-50 hover:opacity-70'}\n                      ${isLast ? '!cursor-not-allowed' : ''}`}\n                    style={isEnabled ? { background: color } : undefined}\n                  >\n                    <div className=\"px-2 pt-1.5 pb-0.5 flex items-center gap-1 pr-8 min-w-[70px]\">\n                      <Icon className={`w-3 h-3 shrink-0 ${isEnabled ? 'text-white/80' : 'text-gray-400'}`} />\n                      <span className={`text-[11px] font-semibold whitespace-nowrap ${isEnabled ? 'text-white' : ''}`}>\n                        {bot.Nickname}\n                      </span>\n                    </div>\n                    <div className={`px-2 pb-1.5 text-[9px] whitespace-nowrap max-w-[110px] truncate ${isEnabled ? 'text-white/60' : 'text-gray-400'}`}>\n                      {prov ? prov.Name : '未配置模型'}\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                  {/* 悬浮操作 */}\n                  <div className=\"absolute top-1 right-1 hidden group-hover/card:flex gap-0.5\">\n                    <button\n                      onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setIsNewBot(false); setEditingBot({ ...bot }); }}\n                      className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded-md bg-white/90 dark:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-white/30 transition-colors\"\n                      title=\"编辑\">\n                      <Pencil className=\"w-2.5 h-2.5 text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300\" />\n                    </button>\n                    <button\n                      onClick={e => { e.stopPropagation(); setDeleteConfirm(bot.Id); }}\n                      className=\"w-5 h-5 rounded-md bg-white/90 dark:bg-white/20 backdrop-blur flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-red-100 dark:hover:bg-red-900/40 transition-colors\"\n                      title=\"删除\">\n                      <Trash2 className=\"w-2.5 h-2.5 text-red-500\" />\n                    </button>\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n              );\n            })}\n\n            {/* 添加按钮 */}\n            {bots.length < MAX_BOTS && (\n              <button onClick={handleAddBot}\n                className=\"shrink-0 min-h-[46px] px-3 rounded-xl border border-dashed border-gray-300 dark:border-white/20\n                           flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-0.5 text-gray-400 hover:border-[var(--primary-color)] hover:text-[var(--primary-color)]\n                           transition-colors\">\n                <Plus className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5\" />\n                <span className=\"text-[9px]\">添加</span>\n              </button>\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {bots.length >= MAX_BOTS && (\n            <span className=\"shrink-0 text-[10px] text-gray-400 whitespace-nowrap\">已满 {MAX_BOTS} 个</span>\n          )}\n\n          {/* 前往模型服务 */}\n          <Link to=\"/models\"\n            className=\"shrink-0 flex items-center gap-1.5 h-8 px-2.5 rounded-xl bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/10 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/80 dark:hover:bg-white/15 transition-all text-[11px] text-gray-500\"\n            title=\"管理模型服务\">\n            <Cpu className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5\" />模型\n          </Link>\n        </div>\n      </GlassCard>\n\n      {/* ── 对话区 ──────────────────────────────────── */}\n      <GlassCard className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-2 border-b border-white/10 bg-white/40 dark:bg-white/5 shrink-0\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n            <label className={`flex items-center gap-1.5 cursor-pointer px-2 py-1 rounded-lg transition-all text-[11px] ${\n              sendToDanmaku\n                ? 'bg-[var(--primary-color)]/10 border border-[var(--primary-color)]/30 text-[var(--primary-color)]'\n                : 'bg-white/40 dark:bg-white/5 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/10 text-gray-500 hover:bg-white/60'\n            }`}>\n              <input type=\"checkbox\" checked={sendToDanmaku} onChange={e => toggleSendToDanmaku(e.target.checked)} className=\"w-3 h-3 rounded\" />\n              AI 回复到弹幕\n            </label>\n\n            {/* TTS 声音选择 */}\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\n              <Volume2 className=\"w-3 h-3 text-gray-400 shrink-0\" />\n              <button\n                onClick={() => setVoiceOpen(true)}\n                className=\"flex items-center gap-1 h-[26px] pl-2 pr-2 rounded-lg text-[10px]\n                           bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/8 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/15\n                           hover:bg-white/80 dark:hover:bg-white/15 transition-colors\n                           text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300 max-w-[180px] truncate\"\n                title={ttsVoice}\n              >\n                <span className=\"truncate\">\n                  {(() => {\n                    const v = (['edge_tts','minimax_tts','volcano_engine'] as TtsProvider[]).reduce<any>((found, p) => found ?? findVoice(p, ttsVoice), undefined);\n                    return v ? `${v.name}` : (ttsVoice || '选择声音');\n                  })()}\n                </span>\n                <ChevronDown className=\"w-3 h-3 shrink-0 opacity-50\" />\n              </button>\n            </div>\n            <VoicePicker\n              open={voiceOpen}\n              onClose={() => setVoiceOpen(false)}\n              providers={config ? availableProviders((config.AiProviders ?? []).filter(p => p.ProviderType === 'tts').map(p => p.Name)) : ['edge_tts']}\n              currentVoice={ttsVoice}\n              onSelect={v => { setTtsVoice(v); handleVoiceChange(v); }}\n            />\n\n            {firstEnabled && (\n              <span className=\"text-[10px] text-gray-400 select-none hidden sm:block\">\n                默认 <span className=\"font-medium text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300\">{firstEnabled.Nickname}</span>\n                <span className=\"mx-1 opacity-40\">·</span>@昵称 指定\n              </span>\n            )}\n          </div>\n          \n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\n            <button\n              onClick={() => setPromptOpen(true)}\n              className=\"w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/10 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/15 text-gray-500 hover:bg-white/80 transition-all\"\n              title=\"AI 提示词设置\"\n            >\n              <Settings className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5\" />\n            </button>\n            <button \n              onClick={() => setTestMessages([])} \n              className=\"h-7 px-3 rounded-lg border border-[var(--primary-color)]/30 text-[var(--primary-color)] text-[11px] font-medium hover:bg-[var(--primary-color)]/5 transition-all\"\n            >\n              清空对话\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-4 space-y-3\">\n          {bots.length === 0 ? (\n            <div className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-full gap-3\">\n              <Bot className=\"w-10 h-10 text-gray-300 dark:text-gray-600\" />\n              <div className=\"text-gray-400 text-[12px]\">点击上方「+ 添加」配置第一个机器人</div>\n            </div>\n          ) : testMessages.length === 0 ? (\n            <div className=\"flex items-center justify-center h-full text-gray-400 text-[12px] italic select-none\">\n              {firstEnabled\n                ? `@${firstEnabled.Nickname} 开始对话`\n                : '请先启用至少一个机器人'}\n            </div>\n          ) : (\n            testMessages.map((msg, i) => (\n              <div key={i} className={`flex ${msg.role === 'user' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'}`}>\n                {msg.role === 'error' ? (\n                  <div className=\"max-w-[80%] flex items-start gap-1.5 px-3 py-2 rounded-xl bg-red-50 dark:bg-red-900/20 border border-red-200 dark:border-red-500/30 text-red-600 dark:text-red-400\">\n                    <AlertCircle className=\"w-3.5 h-3.5 shrink-0 mt-0.5\" />\n                    <span className=\"text-[11px] leading-relaxed\">{msg.content}</span>\n                  </div>\n                ) : msg.role === 'user' ? (\n                  <div className=\"max-w-[80%] px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-2xl text-white text-[12px] leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap\"\n                    style={{ background: 'var(--primary-color)' }}>\n                    {msg.content}\n                  </div>\n                ) : (\n                  <div className=\"max-w-[80%] px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-2xl bg-white/70 dark:bg-white/10\">\n                    {msg.botName && (\n                      <div className=\"text-[9px] text-gray-400 mb-1 font-medium\">\n                        {msg.botName}\n                        {msg.providerName && (\n                          <span className=\"opacity-60 font-normal\"> · {msg.providerName}</span>\n                        )}\n                      </div>\n                    )}\n                    <div className=\"text-[12px] leading-relaxed whitespace-pre-wrap\">{msg.content}</div>\n                    <div className=\"flex gap-1.5 mt-2 pt-2 border-t border-gray-200/50 dark:border-white/10\">\n                      <button\n                        onClick={() => handlePlay(msg.content, i)}\n                        disabled={playingId !== null}\n                        className={`flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-[10px] transition-all disabled:opacity-40 ${\n                          playedId === i\n                            ? 'bg-emerald-500/15 text-emerald-600 dark:text-emerald-400'\n                            : 'bg-white/80 dark:bg-white/5 hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-white/15 text-gray-500'\n                        }`}>\n                        {playingId === i\n                          ? <Loader2 className=\"w-3 h-3 animate-spin\" />\n                          : playedId === i\n                            ? <CheckCircle2 className=\"w-3 h-3\" />\n                            : <Volume2 className=\"w-3 h-3\" />\n                        }\n                        {playingId === i ? '播放中' : playedId === i ? '已播放' : '播放'}\n                      </button>\n                      {!sendToDanmaku && (\n                        <button\n                          onClick={async () => {\n                            if (!loggedIn) return;\n                            for (const chunk of (msg.content.match(/.{1,25}/g) || [])) {\n                              try { await api.sendDanmu(chunk); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); }\n                              catch { toast.error('发送失败'); break; }\n                            }\n                            toast.success('已发送');\n                          }}\n                          className=\"flex items-center gap-1 px-2 py-1 rounded-md bg-white/80 dark:bg-white/5 hover:bg-white dark:hover:bg-white/15 text-[10px] text-gray-500 transition-all\">\n                          <Send className=\"w-3 h-3\" />发送\n                        </button>\n                      )}\n                    </div>\n                  </div>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            ))\n          )}\n          {isSending && (\n            <div className=\"flex justify-start\">\n              <div className=\"bg-white/40 dark:bg-white/5 px-3.5 py-2.5 rounded-2xl animate-pulse text-[11px] text-gray-400\">\n                思考中...\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n          <div ref={msgEndRef} />\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"px-4 py-3 border-t border-white/10 shrink-0\">\n          <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n            <Input\n              placeholder={firstEnabled ? `@${firstEnabled.Nickname} 或直接输入...` : '请先启用一个机器人...'}\n              className=\"flex-1 h-9 text-[12px]\"\n              value={inputMessage}\n              disabled={isSending}\n              onChange={e => setInputMessage(e.target.value)}\n              onKeyDown={e => { if (e.key === 'Enter' && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); handleSendMessage(); } }}\n            />\n            <IconButton onClick={handleSendMessage} disabled={isSending} className=\"h-9 w-9\">\n              <Send className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            </IconButton>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </GlassCard>\n\n      {/* ── 编辑弹窗 ─────────────────────────────────── */}\n      {editingBot && (\n        <BotEditModal\n          bot={editingBot} isNew={isNewBot} allBots={bots}\n          llmProviders={(config.AiProviders ?? []).filter(p => (p.ProviderType || 'llm') === 'llm')}\n          onSave={handleSaveBot} onClose={() => setEditingBot(null)}\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {/* ── 提示词设置弹窗 ────────────────────────────── */}\n      {promptOpen && config && (\n        <PromptSettingsModal\n          currentPrompt={config.AiAssistantPrompt}\n          onSave={async (p) => {\n            const next = { ...config, AiAssistantPrompt: p };\n            setConfig(next);\n            await api.saveConfig(next).catch(console.error);\n            setPromptOpen(false);\n            toast.success('设置已保存');\n          }}\n          onClose={() => setPromptOpen(false)}\n        />\n      )}\n\n      {/* ── 删除确认 ─────────────────────────────────── */}\n      {deleteConfirm && (() => {\n        const target = bots.find(b => b.Id === deleteConfirm);\n        const isLast = bots.length === 1;\n        return (\n          <div className=\"fixed inset-0 bg-black/30 backdrop-blur-sm flex items-center justify-center z-[100]\">\n            <GlassCard className=\"w-[300px] p-5 shadow-2xl border border-white/10\">\n              <h3 className=\"text-[13px] font-semibold mb-2\">删除机器人</h3>\n              {isLast ? (\n                <p className=\"text-[12px] text-gray-500 mb-4\">至少需要保留一个机器人。</p>\n              ) : (\n                <p className=\"text-[12px] text-gray-500 mb-4\">\n                  确定删除「<span className=\"font-medium text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-200\">{target?.Nickname}</span>」？\n                </p>\n              )}\n              <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n                <Button variant=\"default\" className=\"flex-1\" onClick={() => setDeleteConfirm(null)}>取消</Button>\n                {!isLast && (\n                  <Button variant=\"destructive\" className=\"flex-1\" onClick={() => handleDeleteBot(deleteConfirm)}>\n                    删除\n                  </Button>\n                )}\n              </div>\n            </GlassCard>\n          </div>\n        );\n      })()}\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n"
  },
  "id": "write_file_1778578858645_0"
}

'男AI'].map(g => (\n                <button\n                  key={g}\n                  onClick={() => setGender(g)}\n                  className={`flex-1 py-2 rounded-xl text-[12px] font-medium }\n  50%       { transform: scaleY(1);   }\n}\n@keyframes sub-in {\n  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(6px); }\n  to   { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0);   }\n}\n@keyframes mic-ring {\n  0%   { transform: scale(1);   opacity: 0.6; }\n  100% { transform: scale(1.9); opacity: 0;   }\n}\n@keyframes dot-blink {\n  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; }\n  50%       { opacity: 0.3; }\n}\n@keyframes ripple-expand {\n  0%   { transform: scale(0.5); opacity: 0.55; }\n  100% { transform: scale(3.2); opacity: 0;    }\n}\n@keyframes ripple-bg {\n  0%, 100% { opacity: 0.04; }\n  50%       { opacity: 0.10; }\n}\n`;\n\n// ── 类型 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\ntype MicState = 'off' | 'listening' | 'speaking';\n\ninterface SubLine {\n  id: string;\n  role: 'user' | 'ai';\n  text: string;\n  fresh: boolean;\n}\n\n// ── 工具 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction parseLog(text: string): SubLine | null {\n  if (text.startsWith('弹幕 ')) {\n    const rest = text.slice(3);\n    const idx  = rest.indexOf(': ');\n    if (idx < 0) return null;\n    return { id: `${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`, role: 'user', text: rest.slice(idx + 2), fresh: true };\n  }\n  const m = text.match(/^\\[([^\\]]+)\\](.+)$/);\n  if (m) return { id: `${Date.now()}-${Math.random()}`, role: 'ai', text: m[2], fresh: true };\n  return null;\n}\n\n// ── 字幕波浪 ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction SubWave({ role }: { role: 'user' | 'ai' }) {\n  const color = role === 'ai' ? 'var(--primary-color)' : '#6b7280';\n  return (\n    <span className=\"inline-flex items-end gap-[2px] ml-1.5 shrink-0\" style={{ height: 11 }}>\n      {[0, 1, 2, 3, 4].map(i => (\n        <span key={i} className=\"w-[2.5px] rounded-full inline-block\"\n          style={{\n            background: color,\n            height: '100%',\n            animation: `wave-bar ${0.48 + (i % 3) * 0.14}s ease-in-out infinite`,\n            animationDelay: `${i * 0.075}s`,\n          }} />\n      ))}\n    </span>\n  );\n}\n\n// ── 麦克风波形（横跨全宽） ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nfunction FullWave({ active, color, barCount = 40 }: {\n  active: boolean; color: string; barCount?: number;\n}) {\n  return (\n    <div className=\"flex items-end justify-center gap-[3px] w-full\" style={{ height: 48 }}>\n      {Array.from({ length: barCount }, (_, i) => {\n        const mid  = Math.floor(barCount / 2);\n        const dist = Math.abs(i - mid);\n        const maxH = Math.max(10, 100 - dist * 3.5);\n        return (\n          <div key={i} className=\"rounded-full origin-bottom flex-1 max-w-[5px]\"\n            style={{\n              background: color,\n              height: `${maxH}%`,\n              animation: active ? '未配置'}\n      </Link>\n    );\n  }\n  return (\n    <div className=\"relative\">\n      <select value={value} onChange={e => onChange(e.target.value)} disabled={disabled}\n        className=\"h-[30px] pl-2.5 pr-7 rounded-xl appearance-none text-[11px] cursor-pointer\n                   bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/8 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/15\n                   focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--primary-color)]/40\n                   text-gray-700 dark:text-gray-100 disabled:opacity-40\">\n        {options.map(o => <option key={o.value} value={o.value}>{o.label}</option>)}\n      </select>\n      <ChevronDown className=\"absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-3 h-3 text-gray-400 pointer-events-none\" />\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n\n// ── 主组件 ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\n\nexport function Voice() {\n  const [config,  setConfig]  = useState<AppConfig | null>(null);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);\n\n  const [llmId,      setLlmId]      = useState('');\n  const [asrId,      setAsrId]      = useState('');\n  const [ttsId,      setTtsId]      = useState('');\n  const [ttsVoice,   setTtsVoice]   = useState('zh-CN-XiaoxiaoNeural');\n  const [voiceOpen,  setVoiceOpen]  = useState(false);\n  const [settingsOpen, setSettingsOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [ttsEnabled, setTtsEnabled] = useState(false);\n  const [asrEnabled, setAsrEnabled] = useState(false);\n\n  const [micState,  setMicState]  = useState<MicState>('off');\n  const [subtitles, setSubtitles] = useState<SubLine[]>([]);\n  const [latency,   setLatency]   = useState(0);\n\n  const [modelStatus, setModelStatus] = useState<{ vad_model_ok: boolean; });\n    return () => unl?.();\n  }, []);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    if (subRef.current) subRef.current.scrollTop = subRef.current.scrollHeight;\n  }, [subtitles]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    let unl: (() => void) | undefined;\n    api.onSessionSummary(() => {\n      setLatency(p => Math.max(55, Math.min(480, p + (Math.random() > 0.5 ? 1 : -1) * Math.floor(Math.random() * 22))));\n    }).then(f => { unl = f; }\n    } else {\n      const updated = { ...config!, VadEnabled: false };\n      setConfig(updated);\n      await api.saveConfig(updated);\n      await api.stopMonitor().catch(() => {});\n      await api.startMonitor().catch(() => {});\n      setMicState('off');\n      setLatency(0);\n      toast.success('语音识别已关闭');\n    }\n  };\n\n  const micActive = micState !== 'off';\n  const micColor  = micState === 'speaking' ? const ttsOpts = ttsList(config).map(p => ({ value: p.Id, label: p.Name }));\n\n  const latestFresh = subtitles.filter(s => s.fresh).at(-1);\n\n  if (loading) return <div className=\"h-full flex </div>\n            <div className=\"w-px h-4 bg-black/8 dark:bg-white/12 shrink-0\" />\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n              <span className=\"text-[10px] text-gray-400 whitespace-nowrap font-medium\">ASR</span>\n              <Toggle checked={asrEnabled} onChange={onAsrToggle} />\n              <GlassSelect value={asrId} onChange={onAsrChange} options={asrOpts} disabled={!asrEnabled} emptyHint=\"去配置\" />\n            </div>\n            <div className=\"w-px h-4 bg-black/8 dark:bg-white/12 shrink-0\" />\n            <div className=\"flex         <GlassSelect value={ttsId} onChange={onTtsChange} options={ttsOpts} disabled={!ttsEnabled} emptyHint=\"去配置\" />\n              {ttsEnabled && ttsOpts.length > 0 && (\n                <button\n                  onClick={() => setVoiceOpen(true)}\n                  className=\"flex items-center gap-1 h-[30px] px-2.5 rounded-xl text-[11px] bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/8 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/15 hover:bg-white/80 dark:hover:bg-white/15 transition-colors text-gray-600 dark:text-gray-300\"\n                >\n                  {(() => {\n                    const v = (['edge_tts','minimax_tts','volcano_engine'] as any[]).reduce<any>((found, p) => found ?? findVoice(p, ttsVoice), undefined);\n                    return v ? v.name : (ttsVoice || '选择声音');\n                  })()}\n                  <ChevronDown className=\"w-3 h-3 opacity-50\" />\n                </button>\n              )}\n            </div>\n            <VoicePicker\n              open={voiceOpen} onClose={() => setVoiceOpen(false)}\n              providers={config ? availableProviders((config.AiProviders ?? []).filter(p => p.ProviderType === 'tts').map(p => p.Name)) : ['edge_tts']}\n              currentVoice={ttsVoice} onSelect={v => { setTtsVoice(v); onVoiceChange(v); }}\n            />\n\n            <div className=\"flex-1\" />\n\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-3\">\n              <button \n                onClick={() => setSettingsOpen(true)}\n                className=\"w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded-xl bg-black/5 dark:bg-white/10 hover:bg-black/8 text-gray-500 transition-all\"\n                title=\"语音交互设置\"\n              >\n                <Settings className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n              </button>\n              \n              <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n                {micActive && latency > 0 && (\n                  <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1 text-[10px] text-gray-400 font-mono\">\n                    <Activity className=\"w-3 h-3\" />{latency}ms\n                  </div>\n                )}\n                <div className=\"flex items-center gap-1.5\">\n                  <div className=\"w-[6px] h-[6px] rounded-full transition-all\"\n                    style={{\n                      background:  micActive ? '#34c759' : '#d1d5db',\n                      boxShadow:   micActive ? '0 0 6px #34c75988' : 'none',\n                      animation:   micActive ? 'dot-blink 1.4s ease-in-out infinite' : 'none',\n                    }} />\n                  <span className={cn('text-[10px] font-medium', micActive ? 'text-emerald-500 dark:text-emerald-400' : 'text-gray-400')}>\n                    {micState === 'listening' ? '正在聆听' : micState === 'speaking' ? 'AI 回应中' : ''}\n                  </span>\n                </div>\n              </div>\n            </div>\n\n            <div className=\"w-px h-4 bg-black/8 dark:bg-white/12 shrink-0\" />\n\n            <div className=\"relative flex items-center justify-center shrink-0\">\n              {micActive && (\n                <>\n                  <div className=\"absolute rounded-full pointer-events-none\" style={{ width: 54, height: 54, border: `1.5px solid ${micColor}`, animation: 'mic-ring 1.8s ease-out infinite' }} />\n                  <div className=\"absolute rounded-full pointer-events-none\" style={{ width: 54, height: 54, border: `1.5px solid ${micColor}`, animation: 'mic-ring 1.8s ease-out infinite', animationDelay: '0.9s' }} />\n                </>\n              )}\n              <button onClick={handleMicClick} disabled={!micEnabled} className={cn('relative z-10 w-[42px] h-[42px] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center transition-all', micEnabled ? 'hover:scale-105 active:scale-95' : 'cursor-not-allowed opacity-50')}\n                style={{ background: micActive ? `linear-gradient(145deg, ${micColor}, ${micColor}bb)` : micEnabled ? 'linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(0,0,0,0.10), rgba(0,0,0,0.07))' : 'rgba(0,0,0,0.05)', boxShadow: micActive ? `0 6px 22px ${micColor}45, 0 0 0 2px ${micColor}22` : '0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,0.08)' }}>\n                {micActive ? <Mic className=\"w-5 h-5 text-white\" /> : <MicOff className={cn('w-5 h-5', micEnabled ? 'text-gray-500' : 'text-gray-300')} />}\n              </button>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n\n          <div className={cn('overflow-hidden transition-all', micActive ? 'max-h-[60px] mt-3.5 opacity-100' : 'max-h-0 opacity-0')}>\n            <FullWave active={micActive} color={micColor} barCount={50} />\n          </div>\n        </GlassCard>\n\n        <GlassCard className=\"flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden min-h-0 relative\">\n          {micActive && (\n            <div className=\"absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center pointer-events-none overflow-hidden rounded-[18px]\">\n              <div className=\"absolute w-[500px] h-[500px] rounded-full\" style={{ background: `radial-gradient(circle, ${micColor}18 0%, transparent 65%)`, animation: 'ripple-bg 2.4s ease-in-out infinite' }} />\n              {[0, 0.8, 1.6].map((delay, i) => (\n                <div key={i} className=\"absolute rounded-full border\" style={{ width: 120 + i * 80, height: 120 + i * 80, borderColor: `${micColor}35`, animation: `ripple-expand 2.8s ease-out infinite`, animationDelay: `${delay}s` }} />\n              ))}\n            </div>\n          )}\n          <div className=\"relative z-10 flex items-center justify-between px-5 py-3 border-b border-black/5 dark:border-white/8 shrink-0\">\n            <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n              <div className=\"w-[6px] h-[6px] rounded-full shrink-0\" style={{ background:  micActive ? '#34c759' : '#d1d5db', boxShadow:   micActive ? '0 0 6px #34c75980' : 'none', animation:   micActive ? 'dot-blink 1.4s ease-in-out infinite' : 'none' }} />\n              <span className=\"text-[12px] font-semibold\">实时字幕</span>\n            </div>\n            {subtitles.length > 0 && <button onClick={() => setSubtitles([])} className=\"text-[10px] text-gray-400 hover:text-gray-600 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-lg hover:bg-black/5\">清空</button>}\n          </div>\n\n          <div ref={subRef} className=\"relative z-10 flex-1 overflow-y-auto px-5 py-4 space-y-3\">\n            {subtitles.length === 0 ? (\n              <div className=\"h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center gap-2.5 opacity-35 select-none\">\n                <MessageSquareText className=\"w-9 h-9 text-gray-400\" />\n                <p className=\"text-[11px] text-gray-400 text-center leading-relaxed\">开启麦克风后，实时字幕将显示在此处</p>\n              </div>\n            ) : (\n              subtitles.map(s => (\n                <div key={s.id} className={cn('flex items-start gap-2', s.role === 'ai' ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start')} style={{ animation: 'sub-in 0.2s ease-out' }}>\n                  {s.role === 'user' && <span className=\"shrink-0 text-[9px] font-semibold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full mt-0.5 bg-black/6 text-gray-500\">弹</span>}\n                  <div className={cn('flex items-end max-w-[80%] text-[12px] leading-relaxed transition-colors duration-700', s.fresh ? s.role === 'ai' ? 'text-[var(--primary-color)] font-medium' : 'text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-100 font-medium' : 'text-gray-400 dark:text-gray-500')}>\n                    {s.text}\n                    {s.fresh && <SubWave role={s.role} />}\n                  </div>\n                  {s.role === 'ai' && <span className=\"shrink-0 text-[9px] font-semibold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full mt-0.5 bg-[var(--primary-color)]/12 text-[var(--primary-color)]\">AI</span>}\n                </div>\n              ))\n            )}\n          </div>\n\n          {latestFresh && (\n            <div className={cn('relative z-10 shrink-0 px-5 py-3 border-t flex items-center gap-2.5', latestFresh.role === 'ai' ? 'border-[var(--primary-color)]/12 bg-[var(--primary-color)]/5' : 'border-black/5 bg-black/2')}>\n              <span className={cn('shrink-0 text-[9px] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full', latestFresh.role === 'ai' ? 'bg-[var(--primary-color)]/15 text-[var(--primary-color)]' : 'bg-black/8 text-gray-500')}>\n                {latestFresh.role === 'ai' ? 'AI' : '弹幕'}\n              </span>\n              <span className={cn('flex-1 text-[13px] font-medium leading-snug truncate', latestFresh.role === 'ai' ? 'text-[var(--primary-color)]' : 'text-gray-800 dark:text-gray-100')}>\n                {latestFresh.text}\n              </span>\n              <div className=\"flex items-end gap-[2.5px] shrink-0\" style={{ height: 18 }}>\n                {[0, 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6].map(i => <div key={i} className=\"w-[3px] rounded-full\" style={{ background: latestFresh.role === 'ai' ? 'var(--primary-color)' : '#6b7280', height: `${55 + (i % 3) * 20}%`, animation: `wave-bar ${0.42 + (i % 4) * 0.11}s ease-in-out infinite`, animationDelay: `${i * 0.07}s` }} />)}\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </GlassCard>\n      </div>\n\n      {settingsOpen && config && (\n        <VoiceSettingsModal\n          config={config}\n          onSave={async (p) => {\n            const next = { ...config, ...p };\n            setConfig(next);\n            await api.saveConfig(next).catch(console.error);\n            setSettingsOpen(false);\n            toast.success('语音设置已应用');\n          }}\n          onClose={() => setSettingsOpen(false)}\n        />\n      )}\n    </>\n  );\n}\n\nfunction llmList(config: AppConfig | null) { return (config?.AiProviders ?? []).filter(p => (p.ProviderType === 'llm' || !p.ProviderType)); }\nfunction asrList(config: AppConfig | null) { return (config?.AiProviders ?? []).filter(p => p.ProviderType === 'asr'); }\nfunction ttsList(config: AppConfig | null) { return (config?.AiProviders ?? []).filter(p => p.ProviderType === 'tts'); }\n"
  },
  "id": "write_file_1778578965656_0"
}

**Updating UI Components** I've been busy refactoring several key UI components. I successfully updated `AutoReply.tsx` with new tabs and reorganized its settings. `AI.tsx` now features a settings modal and styled buttons, while `Voice.tsx` also received a settings modal and the "Idle" text has been removed. Lastly, I've made some adjustments to the toast container in `App.tsx`.**Removing Redundant Code** I'm now focusing on cleaning up `SettingsPanel.tsx`, removing items that have been relocated to their respective pages like `EntryMsg` and `AiAssistantPrompt`. ## MODEL ✨

我已经完成了 Streamix 配置系统的深度重构，将各项功能精准归位。

### 1. 自动回复页布局重构 (AutoReply.tsx)
我新增了两个 Tab，并重新组织了设置项：
*   **礼物感谢 Tab**：
    *   整合了原本位于系统设置的“礼物感谢频率”（分为普通礼物和盲盒礼物两个独立频率设置）。
    *   保留了门槛设置、艾特开关和感谢语模板。
*   **粉丝互动 Tab (新)**：
    *   从系统设置移入了 **关注感谢** 和 **分享感谢** 的开关。
    *   提供了关注感谢台词模板设置，支持随机轮播多条台词。
    *   移入了 **新水友首次发言欢迎** 开关和模板。
*   **系统事件 Tab (新)**：
    *   从系统设置移入了 **进入直播间提示** 和 **下播答谢提示**。
    *   移入了“不欢迎主播自己”和“不响应机器人自己”的过滤开关。

### 2. AI 机器人交互优化 (AI.tsx)
*   **提示词弹窗**：在“清空对话”按钮左侧新增了“设置”图标，点击可弹出全屏提示词编辑器，用于配置 AI 助手的行为准则。
*   **按钮强化**：为“清空对话”按钮增加了明显的边框颜色，使其与背景区分更清晰。

### 3. 语音交互界面精简 (Voice.tsx)
*   **设置迁移**：将原系统设置中的语音 AI 性别和系统提示词移到了语音页面的“设置”图标中（弹窗形式）。
*   **界面清爽**：去除了界面上原有的“空闲”等冗余状态文字，仅在麦克风激活时显示波形和动态状态。

### 4. 系统设置面板瘦身 (SettingsPanel.tsx)
*   **功能剥离**：移除了所有与业务相关的配置项（已全部按上述规则分发到各业务页面）。
*   **定位清晰**：现在系统设置面板仅保留：**配置文件路径**、**数据库路径** 以及 **版本信息/更新**，变为了纯粹的底层信息中心。

### 5. 全局提示框 (Toast) 优化 (App.tsx)
*   **紧凑包裹**：调整了 Toast 的容器样式，使其宽度根据内容自动包裹（`fit-content`），不再横跨大半个屏幕。
*   **视觉优化**：减小了顶部间距（由 24px 降为 12px），使提示信息出现时更加自然、不遮挡主操作区。

现在的配置逻辑遵循 **“在哪里用，在哪里设”** 的原则，大大降低了用户在不同页面间来回切换配置的成本。

## USER 🧑‍💻

1.全局提示在界面正中间 
2.弹幕管理，停止读取不会断开websocket和停止事件不是同一个行为，只是不在界面读取任何弹幕，TTS语音答谢改成语音答谢，需要选择TTS模型再选择声音，消息界面不要出现去掉系统消息
3.自动回复界面，系统事件的进入直播间提示文字和下播时的答谢公告后面加上：，并且这两段文字大一点醒目一点
4.语音交互界面，设置AI提示词的入口按钮右边的符号文字去掉，语音AI提示词输入框的宽度没有对齐面板，并且需要可以鼠标拖宽
5.去掉设置界面的访问github开源仓库

}

    "content": "import { useState, useEffect, useRef, useCallback } from 'react';\nimport { GlassCard } from '../components/GlassCard';\nimport { Button } from '../components/Button';\nimport { Input } from '../components/Input';\nimport { Play, RefreshCw, X } from 'lucide-react';\nimport { api } from '../lib/api';\nimport { toast } from 'sonner';\nimport { useLoggedIn } from '../context/LoginContext';\n\ntype LogType = 'danmu' | 'gift' | 'interact' | 'other' | 'system';\n\ninterface LogEntry {\n  id: number;\n  type: LogType;\n  text: string;\n  user?: string;\n  content?: string;\n  time: string;\n}\n\nlet _logId = 0;\n\nfunction parseMonitorLog(text: string): LogEntry | null {\n  if (!text) return null;\n  const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();\n  const id = _logId++;\n\n  if (text.startsWith('弹幕 ')) {\n    const rest = text.slice(3);\n    const colonIdx = rest.indexOf(': ');\n    if (colonIdx >= 0) {\n      return { id, type: 'danmu', text, user: rest.slice(0, colonIdx), content: rest.slice(colonIdx + 2), time };\n    }\n    return { id, type: 'danmu', text, time };\n  }\n  if (text.startsWith('礼物 ') || text.startsWith('大航海 ')) {\n    return { id, type: 'gift', text, time };\n  }\n  if (\n    text.startsWith('进场 ') || text.startsWith('进场特效 ') ||\n    text.startsWith('关注 ') || text.startsWith('分享 ') || text.startsWith('互动 ')\n  ) {\n    return { id, type: 'interact', text, time };\n  }\n  if (text.startsWith('禁言 ') || text.startsWith('PK ') || text.startsWith('红包 ') || text.startsWith('天选 ')) {\n    return { id, type: 'other', text, time };\n  }\n  // Skip high-frequency popularity heartbeats\n  if (text.startsWith('人气 ')) return null;\n  // All other messages (system/connection/status)\n  return { id, type: 'system', text, time };\n}\n\nconst typeColors: Record<LogType, string> = {\n  danmu: 'text-sky-600 dark:text-sky-400',\n  gift: 'text-amber-600 dark:text-amber-400',\n  interact: 'text-green-600 dark:text-green-400',\n  other: 'text-purple-600 dark:text-purple-400',\n  system: 'text-gray-400',\n};\n\nconst typeBadge: Record<LogType, string> = {\n  danmu: '弹幕',\n  gift: '礼物',\n  interact: '互动',\n  other: '其他',\n  system: '系统',\n};\n\nexport function Monitor() {\n  const [filter, setFilter] = useState('all');\n  const [message, setMessage] = useState('');\n  const [isMonitoring, setIsMonitoring] = useState(false);\n  const [showLogs, setShowLogs] = useState(true); // 仅控制 UI 显示逻辑\n  const [logs, setLogs] = useState<LogEntry[]>([]);\n  const logEndRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null);\n  const bufferRef = useRef<LogEntry[]>([]);\n  const loggedIn = useLoggedIn();\n\n  // Flush buffered log entries every 200ms for smooth real-time display\n  const flushLogs = useCallback(() => {\n    if (!showLogs || bufferRef.current.length === 0) return;\n    const itemsToFlush = [...bufferRef.current];\n    bufferRef.current = [];\n    setLogs(prev => {\n      const next = [...prev, ...itemsToFlush];\n      return next.length > 500 ? next.slice(next.length - 500) : next;\n    });\n  }, [showLogs]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    checkMonitorStatus();\n    \n    // Load buffered history immediately so page shows logs on first open\n    api.getMonitorLogs().then(rawLogs => {\n      const history = rawLogs\n        .map(parseMonitorLog)\n        .filter((e): e is LogEntry => e !== null)\n        .slice(-200);\n      \n      // Merge history with whatever is already in the buffer\n      bufferRef.current = [...history, ...bufferRef.current];\n      flushLogs();\n    }).catch(console.error);\n\n    // Poll danmaku buffer every 150ms\n    const pollTimer = setInterval(async () => {\n      if (!showLogs) return; // 停止读取时不拉取数据\n      try {\n        const lines = await api.getRecentDanmaku();\n        if (lines.length > 0) {\n          for (const line of lines) {\n            const entry = parseMonitorLog(line);\n            if (entry) bufferRef.current.push(entry);\n          }\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error('[Monitor] Polling error:', err);\n      }\n    }, 150);\n\n    // Batch flush to React state every 200ms\n    const flushTimer = setInterval(() => {\n      if (showLogs && bufferRef.current.length > 0) {\n        flushLogs();\n      }\n    }, 200);\n\n    let unlistenLog: (() => void) | undefined;\n    let unlistenLive: (() => void) | undefined;\n    let unlistenStatus: (() => void) | undefined;\n\n    const setup = async () => {\n      unlistenLog = await api.onMonitorLog((text) => {\n        if (!showLogs) return;\n        const entry = parseMonitorLog(text);\n        if (entry) bufferRef.current.push(entry);\n      });\n      unlistenLive = await api.onLiveEvent((parsed: any) => {\n        if (!showLogs) return;\n        const event = parsed?.event ?? parsed;\n        const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString();\n        const type = event?.type || event?.cmd;\n        if (type === 'Danmu' || type === 'DANMU_MSG') {\n          const user = event.user || event.info?.[2]?.[1] || '未知';\n          const text = event.text || event.info?.[1] || '';\n          if (text) {\n            bufferRef.current.push({ id: _logId++, type: 'danmu', text: `弹幕 ${user}: ${text}`, user, content: text, time });\n          }\n        }\n      });\n      unlistenStatus = await api.onMonitorStatus((status) => {\n        if (status === '已停止') { setIsMonitoring(false); }\n        else if (status === '运行中') { setIsMonitoring(true); }\n      });\n    };\n    setup();\n\n    return () => {\n      clearInterval(pollTimer);\n      clearInterval(flushTimer);\n      if (unlistenLog) unlistenLog();\n      if (unlistenLive) unlistenLive();\n      if (unlistenStatus) unlistenStatus();\n    };\n  }, [showLogs, flushLogs]);\n\n  useEffect(() => {\n    logEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' });\n  }, [logs]);\n\n  const checkMonitorStatus = async () => {\n    try {\n      const status = await api.getMonitorStatus();\n      setIsMonitoring(status);\n    } catch (err) {\n      console.error('Failed to check monitor status:', err);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const toggleMonitor = async () => {\n    if (!loggedIn) { toast.info('请先登录'); return; }\n    setShowLogs(!showLogs);\n    if (!showLogs) {\n      toast.success('已恢复读取弹幕');\n    } else {\n      toast.info('已停止读取（后台连接保持）');\n    }\n  };\n\n  const sendDanmu = async () => {\n    if (!loggedIn) { toast.info('请先登录'); return; }\n    if (!message.trim()) return;\n    try {\n      await api.sendDanmu(message);\n      setMessage('');\n    } catch (err) {\n      toast.error(`发送失败: ${err}`);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const filters = [\n    { id: 'all', label: '全部' },\n    { id: 'danmaku', label: '弹幕' },\n    { id: 'gift', label: '礼物' },\n    { id: 'interact', label: '互动' },\n    { id: 'other', label: '其他' },\n  ];\n\n  const filteredLogs = logs.filter(log => {\n    // 消息界面不要出现系统消息\n    if (log.type === 'system') return false;\n    \n    if (filter === 'all') return true;\n    if (filter === 'danmaku') return log.type === 'danmu';\n    if (filter === 'gift') return log.type === 'gift';\n    if (filter === 'interact') return log.type === 'interact';\n    if (filter === 'other') return log.type === 'other';\n    return true;\n  });\n\n  return (\n    <div className=\"p-4 h-full flex flex-col gap-4 overflow-hidden\">\n      <GlassCard className=\"flex-1 p-4 flex flex-col overflow-hidden\">\n        <div className=\"flex items-center justify-between mb-3\">\n          <div className=\"flex items-center gap-2\">\n            <div className={`w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full ${isMonitoring ? 'bg-green-500 animate-pulse' : 'bg-gray-400'}`} />\n            <span className=\"text-[11px] font-medium text-gray-500\">\n              {isMonitoring ? (showLogs ? '连接成功，正在同步记录...' : '同步中 (已暂停显示)') : '未连接直播间'}\n            </span>\n          </div>\n          <div className=\"flex gap-1.5\">\n            {filters.map((f) => (\n              <button\n                key={f.id}\n                onClick={() => setFilter(f.id)}\n                className={`px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-[11px] transition-all ${\n                  filter === f.id\n                    ? 'bg-[var(--primary-color)] text-white'\n                    : 'bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/10 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/80'\n                }`}\n              >\n                {f.label}\n              </button>\n            ))}\n            <button\n              onClick={() => setLogs([])}\n              className=\"px-3 py-1 rounded-lg text-[11px] bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/10 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/80\"\n            >\n              清空记录\n            </button>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div className=\"flex-1 overflow-y-auto space-y-0.5 bg-black/5 dark:bg-black/20 p-3 rounded-lg\">\n          {filteredLogs.map((log) => (\n            <div\n              key={log.id}\n              className=\"flex items-start gap-2 py-1 border-b border-black/5 dark:border-white/5 text-[11px]\"\n            >\n              <span className=\"text-gray-400 shrink-0 font-mono w-[52px]\">{log.time}</span>\n              <span className={`shrink-0 font-semibold w-[28px] ${typeColors[log.type]}`}>\n                {typeBadge[log.type]}\n              </span>\n              <span className=\"break-all\">\n                {log.type === 'danmu' ? (\n                  <>\n                    <span className=\"font-medium\">{log.user}</span>\n                    <span className=\"text-gray-400 mx-1\">:</span>\n                    <span>{log.content}</span>\n                  </>\n                ) : (\n                  <span>{log.text}</span>\n                )}\n              </span>\n            </div>\n          ))}\n          <div ref={logEndRef} />\n          {filteredLogs.length === 0 && (\n            <div className=\"text-gray-400 text-center py-10 italic text-[11px]\">\n              {isMonitoring ? (showLogs ? '监控中，等待记录...' : '已停止读取，记录已隐藏') : '请先建立 WebSocket 连接'}\n            </div>\n          )}\n        </div>\n      </GlassCard>\n\n      <GlassCard className=\"p-4\">\n        <div className=\"flex gap-2\">\n          <Input\n            value={message}\n            onChange={(e) => setMessage(e.target.value)}\n            onKeyDown={(e) => e.key === 'Enter' && sendDanmu()}\n            placeholder=\"输入要发送的弹幕（最多 30 字）…\"\n            className=\"flex-1\"\n            maxLength={30}\n          />\n          <Button \n            variant=\"primary\" \n            onClick={sendDanmu} \n            disabled={!loggedIn || !message.trim()}\n            className=\"min-w-[80px]\"\n          >\n            {!loggedIn ? '请先登录' : !message.trim() ? '请输入内容' : '发送弹幕'}\n          </Button>\n          \n          <button\n            onClick={toggleMonitor}\n            title={showLogs ? \"停止读取\" : \"开始读取\"}\n            className={`w-9 h-9 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center transition-all flex-shrink-0 ${showLogs ? 'bg-red-500/10 text-red-500 border-red-500/20' : 'bg-green-500/10 text-green-500 border-green-500/20'} border`}\n          >\n            {showLogs ? <X className=\"w-4 h-4\" /> : <Play className=\"w-4 h-4\" />}\n          </button>\n\n          {!isMonitoring && (\n            <button\n              onClick={async () => { try { await api.startMonitor(); setIsMonitoring(true); } catch(e){ toast.error(\"连接失败\"); } }}\n              title=\"建立 WebSocket 连接\"\n              className=\"w-9 h-9 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center bg-white/60 dark:bg-white/10 border border-gray-200 dark:border-white/20 hover:bg-white/80 transition-all flex-shrink-0\"\n            >\n              <RefreshCw className=\"w-4 h-4\" />\n            </button>\n          )}\n        </div>\n        <div className=\"text-[10px] text-gray-400 mt-2 text-right\">\n          {message.length}/30\n        </div>\n      </GlassCard>\n    </div>\n  );\n}\n",
    "file_path": "src-tauri/src/app/pages/Monitor.tsx"
  },
  "id": "write_file_1778582307124_0"
}
